---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug on the DojOps website
labels: bug
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of the issue (visual glitch, broken link, animation issue, etc).

**Page / section**
Which part of the page is affected?

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to see.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots showing the issue.

**Environment**

- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Screen size: [e.g. desktop, mobile]
